summary: Tested Level/Infrastructure/Leaderboard system features. All 12 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/player/level-info returns level, xp, fame, progress
Backend: GET /api/infrastructure/types returns 11 infrastructure types with level/fame requirements
Backend: Infrastructure level requirements verified (Cinema Lv5, Drive-In Lv8, Shopping Mall Lv10, Cinema School Lv25, Museum Lv30, Theme Park Lv50)
Backend: GET /api/infrastructure/cities returns 10 countries with cities
Backend: GET /api/infrastructure/my returns user's infrastructure (empty for new user)
Backend: GET /api/leaderboard/global returns sorted players with scores and ranks
Backend: Leaderboard score includes level, fame, and revenue components
Backend: GET /api/players/{id}/profile returns public player profile
Backend: Player profile 404 for invalid ID
Backend: GET /api/minigames/cooldowns returns cooldown status for 5 games
Backend: XP rewards system integrated with level progression
Frontend: Login functionality works
Frontend: Level badge (Lv.0) displayed in navbar
Frontend: Infrastructure page shows Level 0, Fame 50 progress
Frontend: Infrastructure page shows 11 infrastructure types with level/fame requirements
Frontend: All infrastructure locked (Bloccato) for level 0 user as expected
Frontend: Leaderboard page shows Global/Locale tabs
Frontend: Leaderboard displays 8 players with ranks, levels, fame scores
Frontend: Mini Games page shows 5 games with Play Now buttons
Frontend: User funds displayed correctly ($10,000,000)

level_system.details: XP-based leveling with exponential growth. Level 0 starts at 0 XP, needs 100 XP for Level 1. Progress percent calculated correctly.

infrastructure_types.details: 11 infrastructure types: cinema (Lv5), drive_in (Lv8), multiplex_small (Lv10), production_studio (Lv15), multiplex_medium (Lv20), cinema_school (Lv25), cinema_museum (Lv30), multiplex_large (Lv35), vip_cinema (Lv40), film_festival_venue (Lv45), theme_park (Lv50)

infrastructure_cities.details: 10 countries (USA, Italy, Spain, France, Germany, UK, Japan, China, Brazil, India) with cities containing wealth, population, cost_multiplier

leaderboard_global.details: Global leaderboard returns sorted players with composite score based on Level (30%), Fame (40%), Revenue (30%)

player_profile.details: Public player profile shows nickname, production_house, level, fame, films_count, infrastructure_count, likes_received, leaderboard_score

minigame_cooldowns.details: 5 minigames (trivia, guess_genre, director_match, box_office_bet, year_guess) with 4 plays per 4 hours cooldown system

context_for_next_testing_agent: All level/infrastructure/leaderboard features verified working. Test user (newtest@cineworld.com) is at Level 0 with Fame 50 and $10M funds. 11 infrastructure types available with progressive level requirements. Leaderboard shows 8 players with composite scores. Minigames have 4 plays/4 hours cooldown. XP system awards points for films, minigames, likes, and infrastructure purchases.
